root.name: Change slide 1 title from 'AIRCRAFT SURFACE' to 'AIRCRAFT FUNDAMENTALS'
root.description: Evaluates whether the agent correctly changed the title text on slide 1 exactly as instructed, made no unnecessary extraneous modifications, and preserved slide integrity.

children.name: Title Text Correctly Changed on Slide 1
children.description: Checks that the title text on slide 1 was changed from 'AIRCRAFT SURFACE' to exactly 'AIRCRAFT FUNDAMENTALS'.

children.name: No Unintended Slide 1 Changes
children.description: Checks that only the title was changed on slide 1 – no other elements or content were altered.

children.name: No Extraneous Changes Elsewhere
children.description: Checks that there are no other changes made to other slides or to animations/transitions throughout the presentation.

children.name: No Changes to Other Slides
children.description: Ensures that only slide 1 was modified, and all other slides remain unaltered.

children.name: No Changes to Animations or Transitions
children.description: Ensures that no animations or transitions were added, removed, or modified anywhere in the presentation.

metadata.task: On slide 1, Change the title 'AIRCRAFT SURFACE' to 'AIRCRAFT FUNDAMENTALS'
